description: As a Datacenter Inventory Auditor, process the physical audit notes for 'Datacenter - Rack A' located at /home/ga/Desktop/audit_notes_rack_a.txt. Log a formal audit for the four assets identified in the notes, setting their 'Next Audit Date' to 2026-09-08 and adding the note 'Q1 2026 Physical Audit'. During this process, permanently update the location of SRV-RACKB-99 to 'Datacenter - Rack A'. Additionally, identify the asset SRV-RACKA-04 which is assigned to Rack A in the system but missing from the physical notes; update its status to 'Lost/Stolen' and append 'Not found during Q1 2026 physical audit' to its record notes without performing an audit on it.

metadata.expected_missing_note: Not found during Q1 2026 physical audit
